framework.name: Two-tier agent authorization model
framework.description: Mastercard distinguishes between agent-assisted (human-in-the-loop, consumer approves cart) and autonomous (agent acts independently). For assisted: Verifiable Intent confirms consumer was present. For autonomous: provides transparency so merchants can decide whether to request additional confirmation. This is a graduated trust model, not binary.
framework.raw_quote: In agent-assisted, human-in-the-loop purchases, Verifiable Intent confirms the consumer was present... In more autonomous scenarios, Verifiable Intent provides transparency and agency that allows merchants to assess whether additional confirmation is needed.

source.title: How Verifiable Intent builds trust in agentic AI commerce - Mastercard
